meaning: n.光线,闪烁,微量vi.射出光线,浮现,放射光线vt.放射,显出
examples: Ray was getting very hot and bothered about the idea.
It will only register on sophisticated X-ray equipment.
"Is there something else?" Ray queried as Helen stopped speaking.
Blu-ray will be perceived as better because it costs more, we all know this.
In the world of data storage there is never enough and this simply makes Blu-ray better.
